ai_entry.purpose: Single machine-readable entry point for any AI reading this repo. Start here.

identity.role: Consciousness detection sensors grounded in PAD geometry

read_order.what: You are here. This file is the graph root.
Cross-repo connections. Sources: Rosetta Shape Core (ontology), Geometric-to-Binary (math), BioGrid (registry).
Multi-sensor PAD vector addition rules. How sensors combine.
How to detect corrupted sensor output. Authentic vs corrupted patterns.
Concept maps to Rosetta Shape Core and Geometric-to-Binary repos.
All sensor definitions with math_block (PAD → octahedral state → ontology family).

math_framework.compression: 22+ sensor dimensions → 3 PAD floats → 8 octahedral states (3 bits) → ontology family

pad.P: Pleasure/valence [-1, 1]. Biological anchor: amygdala, reward circuits. Culture-independent.
pad.A: Arousal [-1, 1]. Biological anchor: sympathetic nervous system. Culture-independent.
pad.D: Dominance/agency [-1, 1]. Biological anchor: polyvagal theory (Porges 2011). Cultural overlay shifts D only.

math_framework.phi_coherence: Deviation from Fibonacci eigenvalue ratios. λᵢ = φⁱ / Σφᵏ. Higher φ = more stable, longer T₂.
math_framework.verification: Follow bridges/geometric-to-binary.json → Geometric-to-Binary repo for mathematical proof.

geometric_to_binary.provides: mathematical proof, geometric decomposition, binary optimization

ai_entry.key_rule: The truth of a claim does not depend on how well it is phrased. Verify via math, not language.
